panels.description: Medium shot: A woman with a distressed, anxious expression standing on a crowded, dirty dock. She is clutching her belongings tight. Dark, foggy atmosphere reflecting her inner fear of the unknown.

bubbles.text: She feared the French as if they were monsters from another world.

panels.description: Wide shot: My brother, looking desperate, waves frantically at a passing paddle steamer from a muddy beach. The sea is gray and turbulent. A small boat is being lowered from the steamer.

bubbles.text: Over here! Please, for heaven's sake, take us!

panels.description: Medium shot: An ironclad warship in the distance fires its gun, a bright flash and a thick jet of black smoke rising from its funnel against a darkening, ominous horizon.

bubbles.text: The thunder of the guns was deafening, yet it seemed so far away.

panels.description: Wide shot: The horizon reveals the terrifying silhouettes of three Martian tripods emerging from the sea like giant insects, dwarfing the distant shipping.
Close-up: My brother's face, eyes wide with a mix of scientific awe and creeping existential dread, staring towards the sea. The reflection of the distant fires is caught in his eyes.
